input.prompt:
1. TASK: Determine how to monitor new releases for GitHub repo code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent and generate useful human-readable summaries of new features.
2. EXPECTED OUTCOME: Concise findings with recommended automation approach (GitHub notifications/RSS/API + LLM summarization), and concrete API endpoints or commands.
3. REQUIRED TOOLS: GitHub API/docs, repository docs, web search.
4. MUST DO: Verify current default branch and release endpoint availability; identify stable trigger for new release detection; include practical implementation options for Telegram/email/Slack notifications.
5. MUST NOT DO: Do not propose fake tools, do not invent undocumented OpenClaw-specific features, do not assume private APIs.
6. CONTEXT: User wants not just changelog, but explanations of what changed and how to use new capabilities quickly. Repo URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
